The agent is at the start of the episode with a goal distance of 5136 cm and a bearing of +34 degrees. I need to calibrate the bearing sign convention first. According to skill #6, I should execute one deliberate test turn to observe how the bearing value changes. Since the bearing is positive (+34), I'll start by turning left to see if that moves the bearing closer to zero (which would indicate that left turns reduce positive bearings).

Let me turn left first to calibrate the bearing convention.
</think>

<tool_call>
<function=TURN_LEFT>
</function>
</tool_call>
